features: 【ULTIMATE COMFORT & HEARING PROTECTION】 - Noise cancelling ear plugs gives you hearing protection and comfort while sleeping, reading, partner’s snoring, local travelling,while doing DIY at home.Soft earbuds are essential frequent flyers to control air pressure in plane.
【CLASSIC BULLET SHAPE】 - Bullet shape earplugs are designed to fit well in your ear canal for maximum comfort even you use them for longer period.
These are suitable for longer ear wearing and do not cause pressure, pain, irritation or itching. Made from polyurethane foam
Ideal for those who have a snoring partner or other disturbances
description: CS Medic Soft Foam Ear Plugs are a reliable and comfortable solution for noise reduction and ear protection. Whether you're trying to sleep through snoring, concentrate in a noisy workspace, or travel in peace, these high-density foam plugs conform to the shape of your ear canal for a secure, low-pressure fit. With a pack of 10 pairs, they're perfect for regular use at home, work, or on the move. Lightweight, discreet, and effective, CS Medic ear plugs help you enjoy quieter, more restful moments—anywhere, anytime.
